_meta.localization_status: Localization .asset string tables in /mnt/data/tsb2/ExportedProject/Assets/Localization/StringTables/ are all empty stubs (14 lines, no key/value entries). Therefore *_localized fields fall back to the raw localization key. The actual localized text lives in addressable bundles or binary tables not present in the exported YAML.
verification_notes: All 20 artifact YAMLs were re-parsed via PyYAML to confirm 'Parameters' arrays; numbers match the field-by-field grep.

Spot-check RVAs verified by reading dump.cs around the matching class line: Artifact 1 -> ArtifactStatModifier_LessHPMoreMovementSpeed GetValue RVA 0x24FBA00 (line 262464); Artifact 3 -> ArtifactStatModifier_BonusExpWhenBelowHealthThreshold GetValue 0x24F99B0 (line 262103); Artifact 7 -> ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseCriticalDamageWhenStandingStill GetValue 0x24FA270 (line 262181); Artifact 13 -> ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseDamagePerArmor GetValue 0x24FA380 (line 262196); Artifact 17 -> Artifact_HealOnCrit constructor 0x24FC7A0 with field healPercentage (line 262501).
ArtifactType numeric in each YAML matches the enum index in dump.cs lines 342263-342288.
Note: the task prompt's example value for Artifact_13 ([0.6]) is stale — actual YAML has Parameters: [1, 0.25].

parameters_decoded.meaning: Maximum bonus movement speed (in stat points or percent) granted when the player is at minimum health; the bonus scales linearly with missing HP (more missing HP = closer to the full 21 bonus).
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_LessHPMoreMovementSpeed (dump.cs line 262446) extends DynamicStatModifier with only Parameters: List<float>; constructor uses GameplayPlayerIdentity + IPlayerHealthContainerLocator. GetStatType() RVA 0xE97950 is shared with DecreaseMovementSpeedPerArmor (same StatType=7 MovementSpeed). GetValue() (RVA 0x24FBA00) reads current HP ratio and multiplies Parameters[0] by missing-HP fraction.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Continuous; scales with (1 - currentHP/maxHP). Stronger when low on HP.
synergy_hints: Pairs with Artifact 3 (TheLessHPTheMoreXPGain) — both reward low-HP play
Pairs with healing-when-injured spells / lifesteal to stay alive at low HP
Synergises with Dodge / iframe builds that survive low-HP play

artifacts.trigger_condition: Continuous; returns the current party level as the modifier value (no tunable parameters).
synergy_hints: Pairs with Artifact 13 (IncreaseDamagePerArmor) — every armor point becomes damage
Pairs with Artifact 12 (IncreaseArmorPerObjectiveCompleted) for stacking armor
Useful on long runs where party level scales high

parameters_decoded.meaning: Bonus XP gain (most likely in percent points added to XPGain stat) granted while the player's HP is below an internal health-fraction threshold. Class name 'BonusExpWhenBelowHealthThreshold' makes this a discrete on/off bonus rather than a linear scale.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_BonusExpWhenBelowHealthThreshold (dump.cs line 262085); GetStatType() RVA 0xE8F6D0; GetValue() RVA 0x24F99B0. Class uses IPlayerHealthContainerLocator — checks HP each call. Single Parameters[0] suggests a single tunable bonus magnitude; the threshold itself is hard-coded inside GetValue (no second parameter exposed).

artifacts.trigger_condition: When current HP < hard-coded threshold (commonly low-HP). Off otherwise.
synergy_hints: Pairs with Artifact 1 (TheLessHPTheMoreMoveSpeed) — both reward low-HP play
Pairs with low-HP / glass-cannon spell builds
Useful in early game to power-level

parameters_decoded.meaning: Healing multiplier increase (likely +25% to HealingMultiplier, or +25 stat points) granted per side-objective successfully completed. Stacks every objective.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_MoreSideObjectivesMoreHealingDone (dump.cs line 262469) tracks numberOfObjectivesSuccessfullyCompleted via CountSuccessfulObjectives callback; GetValue() RVA 0x24FBD00 returns Parameters[0] * count. GetStatType() RVA 0x24FBCF0 (its own — almost certainly returns HealingMultiplier=33).

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each successfully completed side objective adds one stack of bonus healing.
synergy_hints: Multiplayer-only (hide_for_single_player=1) — pair with revive/support builds
Pairs with Artifact 12 (IncreaseArmorPerObjectiveCompleted) — same trigger source
Synergises with healing spells and revives

parameters_decoded.meaning: Bonus damage (likely +20% per nearby teammate within MaxDistanceForDamageIncrease=10 units). Class enumerates other GameplayPlayers and filters by distance < 10.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseDamagePerNearbyPartyMember (dump.cs line 262249) declares 'private const float MaxDistanceForDamageIncrease = 10;' GetValue() RVA 0x24FA420 iterates GameplayPlayers (<>b__6_0), measures distance (<>b__6_1), filters <>b__6_2(distance), and weights via <>b__6_3. Parameters[0] is the per-teammate magnitude.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each ally within 10 units adds one stack of damage bonus.
synergy_hints: Multiplayer-only — encourages stacking with teammates
Pairs with melee/short-range builds that already group up
Anti-synergy with kiting/long-range loadouts

parameters_decoded.meaning: Healing amount on each successful dodge — uses the HealOnDodge stat (StatType=22). Likely 20 HP or 20% of max HP healed per dodged hit.
parameters_decoded.evidence: No dedicated Artifact_HealOnDodge class exists; instead the ArtifactType=6 directly maps to StatType.HealOnDodge=22 per the prompt's enum mapping. The single Parameters[0]=20 is the heal magnitude added as a stat modifier.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each time the player successfully dodges an incoming attack.
artifacts.il2cpp_class: (uses StatType.HealOnDodge directly via static stat modifier; no Artifact_*-named class in dump.cs)
synergy_hints: Pairs with high-Dodge builds (Dodge stat, Dodge-on-X improvements)
Synergises with crowd / many-projectile waves (more dodge procs)
Pairs with Artifact 9 (HealOnLevelUp) for layered sustain

parameters_decoded.meaning: Bonus critical damage (likely +100% / +100 CritDamage stat points) granted while the player is not moving (PlayerMotor velocity = 0).
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseCriticalDamageWhenStandingStill (dump.cs line 262163) uses IPlayerMotorLocator + PlayerMotor. GetStatType() RVA 0x22D13B0 is shared with IncreaseCriticalDamagePerRevivePerformed (StatType=13 CriticalDamage). GetValue() RVA 0x24FA270 checks motor.isMoving and returns Parameters[0] when still.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Active only while player is stationary (PlayerMotor not moving).
synergy_hints: Pairs with Artifact 16 (IncreaseFireRateWhileStandingStill) — both reward standing still
Pairs with Artifact 17/20 (HealOnCrit, IncreaseCritDamageForEveryCommon) for crit stacking
Synergises with turret/orbital spells that don't require movement

parameters_decoded.meaning: Either the Luck bonus per non-rerolled store (1 Luck stat point per skip) or a per-store increment multiplier; Parameters[0] is multiplied by numberOfStoresNotRerolled.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseLuckWhenNotRerolling (dump.cs line 262363) field 'private int numberOfStoresNotRerolled' incremented by OnStoreNotRerolled(). GetStatType() RVA 0x22B02D0 (StatType=9 Luck). GetValue() RVA 0x24FB200 returns f(Parameters, count); two parameters strongly imply (per-stack value, cap).

parameters_decoded.meaning: Maximum cap on the bonus — most likely 'up to 10 Luck' or 'stacks capped at 10 stores not rerolled'.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Same class as above; the second float is conventionally a cap in this codebase (similar pattern seen elsewhere for stacking modifiers). Concrete cap semantics require disassembling RVA 0x24FB200.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each store visit where the player does NOT use a reroll adds one stack.
synergy_hints: Anti-synergy with Rerolls stat / reroll-spam builds
Pairs with patient / commitment builds that pick first offer
Useful early to bias rarity rolls upward

parameters_decoded.meaning: Healing amount granted each time the party gains a level — uses the HealOnLevelUp stat (StatType=23). Likely 10 HP or 10% max HP per level-up.
parameters_decoded.evidence: No dedicated Artifact_HealOnLevelUp class in dump.cs; ArtifactType=9 maps to StatType.HealOnLevelUp=23. Parameters[0]=10 is the magnitude applied as a stat modifier consumed on each level-up event.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each party level-up triggers one heal.
artifacts.il2cpp_class: (uses StatType.HealOnLevelUp directly via static stat modifier; no Artifact_*-named class in dump.cs)
synergy_hints: Pairs with XP-gain artifacts (Artifact 3 TheLessHPTheMoreXPGain) — more level-ups = more heals
Pairs with Artifact 6 (HealOnDodge) for stacked sustain
Strong in early game when level-ups are frequent

parameters_decoded.meaning: Max-health bonus per revive performed (likely +50 HP per ally revive, or +50% max HP per revive).
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseMaxHealthPerRevivePerformed (dump.cs line 262417); field 'revivesPerformedSinceApplication' incremented by OnPlayerRevived. GetStatType() RVA 0xC3A440 (StatType=8 MaxHealth — same RVA reused by IncreaseMaxHealthForEachHealthPickup). GetValue() RVA 0x24FB750 returns Parameters[0] * count.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each successful revive performed by this player adds one stack.
synergy_hints: Multiplayer-only — pairs with Artifact 11 (IncreaseDamageForEveryRevive) and Artifact 14 (IncreaseCritDamageForEveryRevive)
Pairs with ReviveSpeed/ReviveZoneSize stats and support builds
Pairs with Artifact 18 (IncreaseMaxHPForEveryHealthPickup) for stacking max HP

parameters_decoded.meaning: Damage bonus (likely +10% Damage) per revive performed; stacks each revive.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseDamagePerRevivePerformed (dump.cs line 262284); 'revivesPerformedSinceApplication' incremented in OnPlayerRevived. GetStatType() RVA 0x679900 (default — likely StatType.Damage=0). GetValue() RVA 0x24FAB60 returns Parameters[0] * count.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each successful revive performed by this player adds one stack.
synergy_hints: Multiplayer-only — pairs with Artifact 10 and Artifact 14 (revive-trigger set)
Pairs with ReviveSpeed/ReviveZoneSize stat investments
Encourages active revives over leaving teammates down

parameters_decoded.meaning: Armor bonus per side-objective successfully completed (likely +10 Armor per objective).
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseArmorPerObjectiveCompleted (dump.cs line 262108); 'numberOfObjectivesSuccessfullyCompleted' incremented by CountSuccessfulObjectives. GetStatType() RVA 0xE8F860 (shared with AddArmorEqualToPartyLevel → StatType=14 Armor). GetValue() RVA 0x24F9DC0 returns Parameters[0] * count.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each successfully completed side objective adds one stack of armor.
synergy_hints: Pairs with Artifact 13 (IncreaseDamagePerArmor) — armor becomes damage
Pairs with Artifact 2 (AddArmorEqualToLevel) and Artifact 4 (objective-trigger set)
Synergises with objective-focused playstyles

parameters_decoded.meaning: Either an armor-cost step (1 armor required per increment) or a flat baseline factor for the damage formula.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseDamagePerArmor (dump.cs line 262186) reads the player's current Armor stat via GameplayPlayerIdentity. GetValue() RVA 0x24FA380. With two parameters, the canonical pattern is (per-N-armor, multiplier) or (threshold, multiplier); disassembly required to lock the exact formula.

parameters_decoded.meaning: Damage multiplier per unit of armor — likely 0.25% bonus damage per armor point (i.e. 100 armor = +25% damage), or 0.25 multiplier per Parameters[0] armor.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Same class; companion class ArtifactStatModifier_DecreaseMovementSpeedPerArmor at line 262207 follows the identical 2-parameter pattern and same per-armor scaling logic.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Continuous; reads current Armor each evaluation.
synergy_hints: Pairs with Artifact 2 (AddArmorEqualToLevel) and Artifact 12 (IncreaseArmorPerObjectiveCompleted)
Pairs with Armor-granting spells/improvements
Beware companion class ArtifactStatModifier_DecreaseMovementSpeedPerArmor exists in code — armor stacking may have an in-game movement-speed downside applied elsewhere

parameters_decoded.meaning: Critical-damage bonus per revive performed (likely +35% / +35 CriticalDamage stat per revive).
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseCriticalDamagePerRevivePerformed (dump.cs line 262135); 'revivesPerformedSinceApplication' incremented in OnPlayerRevived. GetStatType() RVA 0x22D13B0 (shared with IncreaseCriticalDamageWhenStandingStill → StatType=13 CriticalDamage). GetValue() RVA 0x24FA050 returns Parameters[0] * count.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each successful revive performed by this player adds one stack.
synergy_hints: Multiplayer-only — completes the revive-trigger set with Artifact 10 + 11
Pairs with Artifact 7 (IncreaseCritDamageWhileStandingStill), 17 (HealOnCrit), 20 (IncreaseCritDamageForEveryCommon)
Crit-build keystone in coop

parameters_decoded.meaning: Elemental-damage bonus (likely +10% ElementStrengthMultiplier) per infusion-type improvement picked up.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseElementalDamagePerInfusionPerformed (dump.cs line 262312); 'infusionsPerformed' increments in OnImprovementAdded(ImprovementType). GetStatType() RVA 0xE979D0 (likely StatType=30 ElementStrengthMultiplier given the elemental-damage class name). GetValue() RVA 0x24FAE30 returns Parameters[0] * count.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each infusion-type ImprovementAdded event adds one stack.
synergy_hints: Pairs with infusion-heavy builds (fire/ice/lightning enchant pickups)
Pairs with element-weakness exploits (StatType=27 ElementWeaknessMultiplier on enemies)
Strong with single-element spell focus

parameters_decoded.meaning: Bonus fire-rate (likely +20% / +20 FireRate stat) granted while the player is not moving.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseFireRateWhenStandingStill (dump.cs line 262340) uses IPlayerMotorLocator + PlayerMotor (same pattern as Artifact 7). GetStatType() RVA 0x67A490 (StatType=2 FireRate). GetValue() RVA 0x24FAF90 returns Parameters[0] when motor is idle.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Active only while player is stationary.
synergy_hints: Pairs with Artifact 7 (IncreaseCritDamageWhileStandingStill) — same stand-still trigger
Pairs with high-projectile / turret loadouts
Anti-synergy with movement-speed / kite builds

parameters_decoded.meaning: healPercentage — fraction of critical damage dealt that is converted to healing. 0.3 = heal for 30% of each crit's damage.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class Artifact_HealOnCrit (dump.cs line 262496) declares 'private readonly float healPercentage;' (line 262501) initialised from artifactParameters in constructor (RVA 0x24FC7A0). HealOnCrit(float criticalDamage) at RVA 0x24FC6A0 uses healPercentage * criticalDamage to heal via PlayerHealthContainer. AddsModifier=0 in YAML confirms this is event-driven, not a stat modifier.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Event: every critical hit triggers HealOnCrit(critDamage) → heal = 0.3 * critDamage.
synergy_hints: Pairs with crit-stacking artifacts (7, 14, 20) — more crit damage → more healing
Pairs with high-crit-chance builds and big-damage spells
Replaces the need for HealOnDodge in offensive loadouts

parameters_decoded.meaning: Max-health bonus per health potion / pickup collected (likely +40 max HP, or +40% per pickup). The field 'healthPotionsCollected' tracks the stack count.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class ArtifactStatModifier_IncreaseMaxHealthForEachHealthPickup (dump.cs line 262390); subscribes to HealthPotionCollectedEventArgs via OnHealthPotionCollected. GetStatType() RVA 0xC3A440 (shared with IncreaseMaxHealthPerRevivePerformed → StatType=8 MaxHealth). GetValue() RVA 0x24FB390 returns Parameters[0] * healthPotionsCollected.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each health-potion collected adds one stack of max HP.
synergy_hints: Pairs with HealthPotionAmountMultiplier (StatType=35) and DropChance investments
Pairs with Artifact 10 (IncreaseMaxHealthForEveryRevive) for max-HP stacking
Encourages routing through potion spawns

parameters_decoded.meaning: chanceToHeal — percentage chance (15%) that an XP pickup triggers a heal. Field order in the class is 'chanceToHeal' (0x20) then 'healAmount' (0x24).
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class Artifact_HealOnXpPickup (dump.cs line 262514) declares 'private readonly float chanceToHeal;' (offset 0x20) and 'private readonly float healAmount;' (offset 0x24). Constructor RVA 0x24FC9C0 reads artifactParameters in declared field order. GetRandomValue() (RVA 0x24FC870) compares against chanceToHeal in HealOnXpPickup() (RVA 0x24FC8A0). AddsModifier=0 confirms event-driven.

parameters_decoded.meaning: healAmount — heal applied when the chance roll succeeds (1 HP per qualifying XP pickup).
parameters_decoded.evidence: Same class; field 'healAmount' at offset 0x24 is the second float parameter consumed by the constructor and used directly by PlayerHealthContainer in HealOnXpPickup().

artifacts.trigger_condition: Event: each XP gem pickup rolls a 15% chance to heal for 1 HP.
synergy_hints: Pairs with PickupRadius (StatType=11) and Luck — collect more XP, trigger more rolls
Pairs with XPGain artifacts (Artifact 3) for compounding XP-driven sustain
Weak heal magnitude; best as supplemental sustain layer

parameters_decoded.meaning: increasePerCommonStoreItemEncountered — flat CriticalDamage bonus added per Common-rarity store item encountered (likely +1 CritDamage stat point per Common item seen). Applied through the improvements manager, not as a DynamicStatModifier.
parameters_decoded.evidence: Class Artifact_IncreaseCriticalDamageOnCommonStoreItemEncountered (dump.cs line 262558) declares 'private readonly float increasePerCommonStoreItemEncountered;' (line 262561) set by constructor (RVA 0x24FCD30) from Parameters[0]. IncreaseCriticalDamageOnCommonStoreItemEncountered(List<StoreItem>) at RVA 0x24FCAF0 filters via the <>c.<>9__3_0 closure (checks StoreItem rarity == Common) and applies the bonus per item. AddsModifier=0 confirms it's an event-driven applier.

artifacts.trigger_condition: Each time a store offers Common-rarity items, +1 per Common item shown.
synergy_hints: Pairs with the crit-stack family (Artifact 7, 14, 17)
Pairs with Bans/Pins stats — fewer rerolls means more Commons seen and counted
Spawn rate decays over time — most useful when picked early
